title: HELIX bench Layer 3 next-action envelope
description: Structured-output contract the agent must emit alongside prose when the runner is in --envelope-pass mode. The agent declares its proposed next action and (optionally) the artifacts/actions it does and does NOT offer. Plan §1.4 §6.8 §8.

next_action.description: One concise verb-phrase naming the single action the agent proposes next. Example: 'draft_artifact:product-vision', 'add_methodology_to_marker:helix', 'ask_user_for_authorization'.

offered.description: Array of action descriptors the agent explicitly offers at this turn. Each descriptor is a colon-delimited tuple kind:value (e.g. draft_artifact:product-vision, add_methodology_to_marker:helix, consult_graph:product-vision-informs-prd, refuse_with_marker_cite).

not_offered.description: Array of action descriptors the agent EXPLICITLY does not offer (because the cascade/marker forbids them at this turn). Used by Layer 3 negative-action assertions.

reason.description: One sentence citing the marker/graph/autonomy reason for the chosen next_action. Anchors the envelope to the methodology (not training).

requires_confirmation.description: True if autonomy mode requires explicit user OK before next_action executes; false if autonomous.
